description: Use this API to return dynamics character array values. This API routine was first introduced in release 28.0.0. ierr, cval = dscval(string, indx)

parameters.name: string
parameters.description: String indicating the dynamics quantity desired. (input).

parameters.name: indx
parameters.description: Index to the dynamics character array. (input).

error_codes.description: Dynamics data not present in working memory; ‘CVAL’ unchanged.
